titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Dr. Joyce Brothers papers,1955-2006.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Evan Fay Earle, July 2007

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Dr. Joyce Brothers Papers,1955-2006.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2007 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Correspondence, Memorabilia, Movie Film, Newspapers, Photographs, Printed Materials.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1947, Columbia University Ph.D. 1955.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

unittitle.extref: Link to a copy of the printed finding aid. (Searchable PDF file)

scopecontent.p: Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dr. Joyce Brothers papers, #4254. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
